# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| 2.x     | ✅        |
| < 2.0   | ❌        |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Please do not report security vulnerabilities via public GitHub issues.**

To report a security issue, open a [GitHub Security Advisory](https://github.com/marcosfpina/securellm-mcp/security/advisories/new) or email directly with a detailed description.

We will:
- Acknowledge the report within 48 hours
- Investigate and confirm the issue
- Release a fix as soon as possible
- Publicly disclose the issue after a fix is deployed

Thank you for helping keep SecureLLM MCP secure.
